@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After successfully listing Swift repositories from the SQLite metadata_database, the agent attempted a cross-database DuckDB query using sqlite_scan that failed ("Unable to open database" in call_XWdjUSKE4U02hjYMR5mYYywc) and then prematurely returned an inability-to-complete message instead of proceeding by querying artifacts_database with the retrieved repo list, stopping early with an incorrect plan.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent simply took the top Swift file from contents by regex-parsing the "copies" text and returned its sample_repo_name (call_39YvGLvMKwO0gWUuzF6b1Fog), without joining to the languages table to ensure the repository is in Swift or using files to select a Swift-language repository containing that most-copied file by its unique ID, leading to the wrong repo.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@
